_comment: Maps downgrade transforms to plain-English, client-facing loss statements. Only GENUINELY lossy categories are listed (dropped data + width-shrinks). Renames, object<->array re-kinds, and enum<->bitmask value transforms are faithful and are NOT reported. Match order per category: exact key -> first matching glob pattern -> generic fallback (which humanizes the type/field name). Edit freely; uncurated keys still produce readable prose via 'generic'.

exact.DataSymmetry: Newer symmetry settings will be reset to defaults.
exact.SettingsSymmetry.enabled: Newer symmetry settings will be reset to defaults.
exact.scale_unit: The document scale / unit setting will be reset.
exact.sssScatteringUsesTranslucency: The subsurface-scattering 'use translucency' option will be reset.

patterns.message: Newer post-processing effects (bloom, depth of field, color correction & grading, glare, lens flare, vignette, sharpen, tone mapping, film grain, chromatic aberration) will be reset to the older version's defaults.
Mesh-map baking setup introduced in newer versions will be removed — you may need to re-bake on the older version.
Some material / effect parameters that use data types added in newer versions will be dropped.

blacklist.generic: "{human}" (added in a newer version) is not supported in the target version and will be removed.

patterns.message: Projects using more than 64 channels will lose any channels beyond the first 64.
Projects using more than 64 channels will lose any channels beyond the first 64.

field_retype.generic: Some "{human}" values may lose precision in the target version.
